sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (id UInt32, tuple1 Tuple(Int32, Int32), tuple2 Tuple(Int32, Int32));
SELECT id, tupleHammingDistance(tuple1, tuple2) AS HammingDistance FROM test_tuples;
UPDATE test_tuples SET tuple1 = (0, 0) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleHammingDistance((1, 2, 3), (1, 2, 4)) AS HammingDistance FROM test_tuples;
